# matrix_room_member (Resource)

Manages one user's membership in a room from the caller's perspective.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "matrix_room_member" "invite_bob" {
  room_id    = matrix_room.example.id
  user_id    = "@bob:example.com"
  membership = "invite"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `membership` (String) Desired membership: invite | join | leave | ban | knock.
- `room_id` (String)
- `user_id` (String)

### Optional

- `reason` (String) Optional reason sent with the state change.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite ID: <room_id>|<user_id>.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Composite ID: <room_id>|<user_id>
tofu import matrix_room_member.example '!abcDEF:example.com|@alice:example.com'
```
